nasb.text: Were they ashamed because of the abomination they have done? They were not even ashamed at all; They did not even know how to blush. Therefore they shall fall among those who fall; At the time that I punish them, They shall be cast down,” says the Lord.

esv.text: Were they ashamed when they committed abomination? No, they were not at all ashamed; they did not know how to blush. Therefore they shall fall among those who fall; at the time that I punish them, they shall be overthrown,” says the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華說： “他們行了可憎的事，本應覺得羞愧， 可是他們一點羞愧都沒有， 恬不知恥。 因此他們必仆倒在倒下的人中間， 我懲罰他們的時候，他們必倒下來。”

ccb.text: 他们做可憎的事会羞愧吗？ 不！他们不知廉耻， 毫不脸红。 因此，他们要与其他人一样灭亡， 死在我的惩罚下。 这是耶和华说的。”
